auth.login.heading: Sign in
auth.login.intro: Enter your email and we'll send you a one-time sign-in link.
auth.login.hint: No password needed. The link is valid for 15 minutes.

auth.sent.body: We've sent a sign-in link to the address you provided. Click the link to finish signing in.
auth.sent.ttl_hint: The link is valid for 15 minutes. You can close this tab.
